sentences.arabic: أَظُنُّ أَنَّ الْكِتَابَةَ الْيَدَوِيَّةَ لَا تَزَالُ مُهِمَّةً.
sentences.translation: Mislim da je ručno pisanje i dalje važno.
sentences.translationEn: I think that handwriting is still important.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ أَكْتُبُ بِيَدِي أَتَذَكَّرُ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Kada pišem rukom, bolje pamtim informacije.
sentences.translationEn: When I write by hand I remember information better.

sentences.arabic: الْكِتَابَةُ عَلَى الْوَرَقِ تُعَبِّرُ عَنْ شَخْصِيَّةِ الْكَاتِبِ.
sentences.translation: Pisanje na papiru izražava ličnost pisca.
sentences.translationEn: Writing on paper expresses the personality of the writer.

sentences.arabic: أُحَاوِلُ أَنْ أَكْتُبَ بِيَدِي كُلَّ يَوْمٍ وَلَوْ قَلِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Trudim se svaki dan pisati rukom, makar malo.
sentences.translationEn: I try to write by hand every day even if just a little.
